title: neubeckia verna
intro: Neubeckia verna, also known as winter aconite, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It contains toxic compounds such as aconitine, which have been used in traditional medicine for their analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Neubeckia verna are believed to provide health benefits including relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved circulation. In herbal preparations, Neubeckia verna is often used in small doses, typically dried and infused in teas or used in tinctures, but caution should be taken due to its toxic compounds.
